languages.text: Чудовище повергнуто, и Лорд-капитан наконец-то может осмотреть склеп своего предка.
With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.
languages.original_text: Чудовище повергнуто, и Лорд-капитан наконец-то может осмотреть склеп своего предка.

traits.locale_text: With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.
When the monster was defeated, the Lord Captain finally got the chance to search {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.
When the monster was defeated, the Lord Captain finally got the chance to search {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.
With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.

languages.text: モンスターを倒すと、ついにロードキャプテンは先祖の墓を探索する機会を得た。
languages.original_text: When the monster was defeated, the Lord Captain finally got the chance to search {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.

traits.locale_text: モンスターを倒すと、ついにロードキャプテンは先祖の墓を探索する機会を得た。

languages.text: Una vez derrotado el monstruo, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán por fin puede investigar la cripta de su antepasado.
languages.original_text: With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.

traits.locale_text: Una vez derrotado el monstruo, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán por fin puede investigar la cripta de su antepasado.

languages.text: Nun, da das Monster besiegt ist, kann der Lord Captain endlich die Krypta seines Vorfahren untersuchen.
languages.original_text: With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.

traits.locale_text: Nun, da das Monster besiegt ist, kann der Lord Captain endlich die Krypta seines Vorfahren untersuchen.

languages.text: Après avoir vaincu le Chasseur, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} est enfin en mesure de fouiller la crypte de son ancêtre.
languages.original_text: With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.

traits.locale_text: Après avoir vaincu le Chasseur, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} est enfin en mesure de fouiller la crypte de son ancêtre.

languages.text: 怪物被击败后，舰长大人终于能够进入其先祖的墓穴进行调查。
languages.original_text: With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.

traits.locale_text: 怪物被击败后，舰长大人终于能够进入其先祖的墓穴进行调查。

languages.text: Canavar yenilince Lord Kaptan, sonunda atasının mezar odasını inceleme fırsatı buldu.
languages.original_text: With the monster defeated, the Lord Captain is finally able to inspect {mf|his|her} ancestor's crypt.

traits.locale_text: Canavar yenilince Lord Kaptan, sonunda atasının mezar odasını inceleme fırsatı buldu.
